title.en: Ye Tian couldn't help but sigh.

content.en:
Ye Tian's Nine Extremes Legion did not dispatch, because his Nine Extremes Legion had only just been founded, and there were not many True Ancestors, so even if they were dispatched, they would not be able to help much.

But the legions of these generals alone were enough to increase the strength of Black Wind Mountain many times.

"There is still a big gap between me and these generals!"

Ye Tian couldn't help but sigh.

He has never taken other generals seriously, and only admires the bloody generals in his heart, but now he knows that he has underestimated other generals.

Maybe the other generals only have the combat power of the Supreme True Ancestor, not his opponent, but the other generals have a large number of True Ancestor legions under their command, and once they are combined into a military formation, they are enough to block the invincible True Ancestor.

Compared with other generals, his background is still very immature.

In fact, Ye Tian didn't expect that these generals still kept their legions, and he also thought that all of these generals' legions had fallen.

What he didn't expect as a general of Black Wind Mountain, it was normal for the Heavenly Sword Sect not to think of it.

Now.

The True Ancestors of the Heavenly Sword Sect were very confused.

What is the most terrifying thing about Black Wind Mountain, not those generals and peak masters.

At the peak of Black Wind Mountain, there were only 108 generals, although the number of peak masters was large, but it was not too many, and it was those legions that were really powerful.

Every general and peak master has a legion, and the accumulated power is too terrifying, and even the Dao Ancestors have a legion under their command.

For example, some Supreme True Ancestors who have not been able to obtain the position of general, what should they do? Without sufficient authority, they can only choose to join the legion under the command of Dao Ancestor and hold important positions.

Therefore, the strength of many legions under the command of Dao Ancestors in Black Wind Mountain is terrifying, and some Dao Ancestors even have invincible True Ancestors, but they are not known to the outside world.

But the domain realm was shattered in a battle, and Black Wind Mountain participated in the war, otherwise the four kings would not have fallen, and the Heavenly King level had also fallen a lot.

The legions under the command of Daozu also directly participated in the war, and many of them were destroyed, but the legions under the general's command did not fight much, so they were able to survive.

It can be said that the strength of Black Wind Mountain is many times weaker now than it was at its peak.

From this, it can be seen how powerful the Black Wind Mountain was at its peak.

Of course, the other Upper Triple Heaven forces have basically participated in the war, but it is just a matter of how much they participate.

After all, the vast sea realm was invaded, and the Heavenly Emperor Palace forcibly recruited the Upper Triple Heaven forces to participate in the war, which dared not to participate in the war, but in the end it was defeated, and even the domain realm was shattered.

"Changfeng Sword Venerable, do you fight, or don't you fight?"

The Ferris General asked.

Changfeng Sword Venerable hesitated, this time he brought an army of 400,000 True Ancestors, including two Invincible True Ancestors, dozens of Supreme True Ancestors, and thousands of top True Ancestors.

How luxurious and powerful such a lineup is, if it is combined with the Zixia Sect, it is not too difficult to deal with the hundreds of thousands of True Ancestors of Black Wind Mountain, after all, the top level will crush the other party.

But now, dozens of legions in the Black Wind Mountain have appeared, and the number of True Ancestors has suddenly reached the level of nearly one million, and the top combat power has suddenly increased.

If it is a battle, there is a great possibility that the Heavenly Sword Sect will be defeated, and it will suffer heavy losses, and if one is not good, he may fall in this battle.

Changfeng Sword Venerable didn't dare to reply immediately, but sent a message back to the Heavenly Sword Sect, and it was up to the sleeping Dao Ancestors of the Heavenly Sword Sect to decide.

Soon, the Heavenly Sword Sect came back with a reply.

"Our Heavenly Sword Sect...... Not involved!"

Changfeng Sword Venerable took a deep breath and said.

"No!" the Purple Red True Ancestor and the Purple Gang True Ancestor yelled in despair.

They have been counting on the Heavenly Sword Sect, otherwise they would not have persevered until now, and now the true ancestors of the Zixia Sect have fought so much, the Heavenly Sword Sect said that they would not fight? What kind of joke is this!

"Let's go!"

With a wave of his sleeves, Changfeng Sword Venerable led many True Ancestors of the Heavenly Sword Sect into the battleship, tore through the void and left, completely ignoring the Zixia Sect.

"Run!"

Zi Chi True Ancestor and Zi Gang True Ancestor sighed.

Immediately, the true ancestors of the Zixia Sect no longer insisted, and began to flee frantically one by one, striving to escape back to the Zixia Sect.

Once he escaped back to the Zixia Sect, with the protection of the Zixia Sect's large array and many hole cards, Black Wind Mountain did not dare to rush into the Zixia Sect.

Moreover, any Upper Triple Heaven force has a way to make Dao Ancestors temporarily resist the rules of the Ancient Realm, so as to show a very terrifying combat power, although the cost is very high, but once the sect is forced to crisis, the Dao Ancestors of the Upper Triple Heaven can't take care of it.

Therefore, Black Wind Mountain also had no ability to destroy the Zixia Sect.

The true ancestors of the Zixia Sect fled with all their might, and the true ancestors of the Black Wind Mountain did not slaughter with all their strength, and after a while, all the true ancestors of the Zixia Sect left this space and completely abandoned this ancient ruin.

--------------

The Heavenly Sword Sect retreated, the Zixia Sect fled, and the Heavenly Spirit Sect dared to come here, completely abandoning this Domain Fragment Space that originally belonged to them.

Subsequently, many True Ancestors of the Black Wind Mountain entered the ruins of this branch of the Nine Shadows Sect one by one.

Ye Tian took the Ferris General and the Blood Demon General to the Nine Shades Forbidden Pool.

When the Ferris General and the Blood Demon General saw the Nine Bloody Pools, they were immediately extremely excited and excited.

"If it's really the Nine Shades Forbidden Pool, Bloody, you didn't lie to me, otherwise I would have lost a lot if I forcibly woke up this time!"

"With the Nine Shades Forbidden Pool, your injuries should be able to heal, and it can also make your Heavenly True Body completely complete!" said the Bloody General.

"Well, but I still want to thank General Jiuji for contributing this piece of information, allowing us to occupy a great advantage in Black Wind Mountain! However, for the sake of safety, let's directly swallow this space into the small realm of the Wind King! In this way, I won't be afraid of other forces snooping!"

The Ferris General proposed.

"Swallow this space?"

Ye Tian was surprised.

This space is so big, it is unimaginably huge to insist on a small universe that was comparable to the previous one!

The point is that this space has been completely integrated into the Xuanxu Ancient Realm, and the True Ancestors can destroy the space, but it is difficult to move the space, and I am afraid that it will be difficult for the Dao Ancestors to do such a means.

The Ferris General and the Blood Demon General have the ability to move this space to the small realm of the Wind King?

Seeing Ye Tian's dumbfounded eyes, General Bloody couldn't help but explain: "General Jiuji doesn't know, our small realm of Black Wind Mountain has the ability to devour the world, if the Ten Kings make a move, even an ancient realm may be able to swallow it in! Once the two of us have obtained the permission of the Wind King, we can try to swallow this space into the Wind King's small realm and turn it into a space in the Wind King's small realm. Many of the spaces you've seen before, some of them were created by the Wind King, and some of them were actually swallowed up by the Wind King's Small Realm!"

"I see!"

Ye Tian understood.

It didn't take long for the Blood Demon General and the Sky General to get permission from the Wind King, obtain temporary permission, and begin to urge the Wind King's small realm to devour this space.

Bang!!!!

The space shook, and the entire Nine Shadows Sect ruins were separated from the void of the Xuanxu Ancient Realm along with the space, and were swallowed up by the Wind King Small Realm little by little.

At this time.

Some Invincible True Ancestors secretly spied over, trying to find the coordinates of the Wind King's Small Domain, but unfortunately, the Wind King's Small Realm was too magical, even if they were devouring space, they couldn't lock the location of the Wind King's Small Domain.

Not to mention them, even if those True Ancestors arrived, there was no way to find the Wind King Small Realm.

Strictly speaking, the small realm of the Wind King is actually moving all the time, and the coordinates are useless at all, even if you find the specific coordinates, it will be useless after a while.

If you want to enter the Wind King Small Realm, the only way is to practice the Black Wind Domain Boundary Technique, but if you are not an official member of the Black Wind Mountain, you are not qualified to cultivate the Black Wind Domain Boundary Technique.

In half an hour, the entire space was completely swallowed up by the Wind King's small realm.

At this point, the ruins of the Nine Shadows Sect Branch are completely owned by Black Wind Mountain.
